capabilities.description: E2E-only: enable the WebDriver bridge (tauri-plugin-wdio-webdriver, gated behind the `e2e` cargo feature) and let the wdio harness force window focus (ensureMacAppFocus in e2e/support/app.ts). The unbundled debug binary doesn't reliably win foreground focus at launch; without focus WKWebView reports the page hidden and isDisplayed() lies. This capability is ONLY loaded via tauri.e2e.conf.json, so wdio-webdriver:default never reaches dev/production builds.
